title: Briful Artificial Succulents Fake Succulent Plants Potted in Mini Square Clear Glass Pots Set of 3 Faux Succulents Small Artificial Succulent Plants Great for Office Home Decor
features: 【Cute & Mini Succulent Plants】 Small artificial plants in pots subtly enlighten any interior or exterior décor with their bright green color that require little to none needed attention to maintain. All faux succulents are unique in their own way which makes them look like a mini exhibition wherever you place them.

【Fake Succulents in Glass Pots】Lifelike mini succulents artificial are potted in cube-shape clear glass pots, simple yet elegant. These mini artificial succulents are housed in a smooth-edged pot that gives them a more well-rounded personality.

【Stunning & Realistic Fake Plants】– Brighten your home with succulents plants artificial decor. Enhanced with realistic texture and color, small faux potted plants supply natural beauty without watering! If you're a succulent plants lover but don't have the time to dedicate in order to keep real plants alive, then these succulents in a pot just perfect for you.

【Perfect for both indoor & outdoor decor】Bathroom plants artificial don't need light to grow, you can place artificial succulent plants in any areas. Bring more color and beauty to home or office, suitable for decorating your table, counter and windowsill etc.

【Maintenance free】Mini succulants are made of plastic while pots are made from glass. Small faux succulent plants don't need to maintain or care for, require no trimming or watering, neither will die nor fade and will stay fresh-looking all year long.
